name: barcode
//engines: No lockfile is committed (see .gitignore), so dependencies resolve fresh on every build. oxlint floated to 1.75.0, which requires this range — a Nixpacks build pinned to NIXPACKS_NODE_VERSION=22 installed 22.11.0 and the deploy failed. Declaring it here lets the builder pick a compatible Node instead of guessing. The Dockerfile's node:22-alpine already satisfies it.
